description: To grow or develop in a rich, healthy, and vigorous way—not merely surviving but expressing full vitality. 'Ruloi' suggests abundance beyond mere adequacy, the kind of growth that occurs when all conditions align and life pours forth generously. It applies to gardens, communities, arts, and individuals alike.
sound_symbolism: The word begins with 'r', the rolling consonant of richness and abundance—sound spilling forward continuously. The deep 'u' holds reserves of strength. Then 'lo' flows with liquid ease, growth spreading in all directions. Finally 'i' rises bright and visible, flourishing in full display.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an intransitive verb: 'lipha ruloi' (the plant flourishes). Often used for communities and endeavors: 'phomila ruloi' (the community flourishes). Stronger than thuroa (grow); implies abundance, not just increase.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Flourishing is the goal of regenerative systems—not mere sustainability but active thriving, life becoming more abundant through wise stewardship.
pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Flourishing is beauty in motion, the ornamental exuberance of life expressing its full capacity.
